case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL VS MADISON, BEVERLY ODETTE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,883.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION - DEPT. OF SOCIAL SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT MADISON, BEVERLY ODETTE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-07-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MADISON, BEVERLY ODETTE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION - DEPT. OF SOCIAL SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MADISON, BEVERLY ODETTE $3,883.00 PRINCIPAL, $41.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,924.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CASE WAS ASSIGNED AND HEARD BY PRO TEMP MCGILL, ROCKY.
